subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: Yea, this day is the Day of the Ancient Beauty and the Age of the Most Great Name. It is the wedding day, these are the springtime days, after which shall come the days of summer, autumn and winter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی امروز یوم جمال قدم و عصر اسم اعظم است روز عروسی است ایام بهار است بعد ایام تابستان و خزان و زمستان میرسد
subcodes.subjects: @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @spiritual springtime, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
